title: Kaworu and Rei
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu and Rei             Quote Post by Shinji-kun » Fri Jul 31, 2009 1:42 pm I was thinking, for Kaoru and Rei, are Adam and Lilith's souls the only ones within the vessels? Do Kaoru and Rei have their own personalities and consciousnesses, or are they just bodies, that Adam and lilith live with?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 31, 2009 1:50 pm not be an arse hole here, but it's Ka w oru and to answer your first query in one word: yes answer to the second: the latter there's also other threads on this somewhere on this board, but IIRC some are locked

[]: Re: Kaoru and Rei             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Aug 02, 2009 6:05 am Shinji-kun wrote: I was thinking, for Kaoru and Rei, are Adam and Lilith's souls the only ones within the vessels? Do Kaoru and Rei have their own personalities and consciousnesses, or are they just bodies, that Adam and lilith live with?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:24 pm One thing that puzzles me about Rei and Lilith being "the same" soul-wise and Giant!Lilith being just a lump of meat though, is the scene in EoE where Lilith and Rei exchange their brief, "Tadaima" "Okaerinasai" That would seem to hint that at the very least the white giant still had some kind of "mind", if not a soul of her own (like the Evas?) Unless it was all in Rei's mind - but that seems a bit... meh.

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:45 pm AuraTwilight wrote: One thing that puzzles me about Rei and Lilith being "the same" soul-wise and Giant!Lilith being just a lump of meat though, is the scene in EoE where Lilith and Rei exchange their brief, "Tadaima" "Okaerinasai" That would seem to hint that at the very least the white giant still had some kind of "mind", if not a soul of her own (like the Evas?) Unless it was all in Rei's mind - but that seems a bit... meh.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Aug 07, 2009 2:01 pm It's not that the Reis are defective, but it's that Rei I had the original soul, then Rei II only had half of it because the other went into Unit 00. Rei III has the full soul, and suffice to say it takes a bit for two split consciousnesses to merge back together in a seamless manner.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji-kun » Fri Aug 07, 2009 3:04 pm So lilith is in Rei but doesnt remember she's lilith

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Aug 07, 2009 9:06 pm Is there much of anything that Lilith might actually remember? For all we know she landed here and started bleeding LCL all over the place, and otherwise has just been comatose. Until she was born in the form of Rei1 Lilith may have essentially been just blank slate.

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Fri Aug 07, 2009 11:43 pm NemZ wrote: Is there much of anything that Lilith might actually remember? For all we know she landed here and started bleeding LCL all over the place, and otherwise has just been comatose. Until she was born in the form of Rei1 Lilith may have essentially been just blank slate.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 08, 2009 2:41 pm So lilith is in Rei but doesnt remember she's lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:16 pm I think it's mentioned that Rei has the incomplete soul of lillith, meaning the part of the soul she has is potentially hers and only becomes lillith when when she combines with angel. Rei's has demonstrated the ability to change through human interaction to the point of experiencing human feelings and emotions that she questions but has an interest in. At the end of the anime series in HI she states that her self "Rei Ayanami" is formed by the interactions she has with others and defines this as her own unique self.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 25, 2009 10:00 pm AuraTwilight wrote: NemZ wrote: Is there much of anything that Lilith might actually remember? For all we know she landed here and started bleeding LCL all over the place, and otherwise has just been comatose. Until she was born in the form of Rei1 Lilith may have essentially been just blank slate.

[]: Kaworu vs. Kaoru             Quote Post by Sheldon Danielson » Fri Feb 19, 2010 2:26 pm About Kaworu versus Kaoru: The name in Japanese is written using katakana: カヲル. Most published versions of the katakana syllabary show the symbol ヲ romanized as o. This leads to Kaoru. Subtitles for the first TV edition use Kaworu and the synch test monitor display shows Kaworu. Subtitles for The End of Evangelion use Kaoru, and when I listen to the Japanese I hear Kaoru, not Kaworu. The name can also be written in kanji: 薫. Bottom line: take your choice. If you want to dig more deeply into this you can read The Sounds of Japanese, by Timothy J. Vance, page 90.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Fri Feb 19, 2010 2:51 pm Yeah, the name said by the man himself sounds like "cow-roo."

[]:             Quote Post by SleepS » Fri Feb 19, 2010 3:31 pm It's implied that Rei I knew her identity, but the part of her soul taken out and put in Unit 00 was the "identity" part of one's soul, thus Rei II's amnesia and her doll-like blankness. She doesn't know who she is, and has no sense of self.

[]: Re: Kaworu vs. Kaoru             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 20, 2010 6:52 am Sheldon Danielson wrote: Bottom line: take your choice.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Feb 20, 2010 7:43 am SleepS wrote: Where is this implied, or at least to the largest exent? Not because I don't believe your reasoning, I just want to go view it myself. =D
